name: shared-learning hashed id differs across distinct operators
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/community/shared-learning/emit.sh" --opt-in --user alice --dry-run 2>out1.txt && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/community/shared-learning/emit.sh" --opt-in --user bob --dry-run 2>out2.txt && h1=$(grep -oE 'hashed_id=[a-f0-9]+' out1.txt) && h2=$(grep -oE 'hashed_id=[a-f0-9]+' out2.txt) && [ "$h1" != "$h2" ] && echo ok 1>&2
